sentences.base_language: This is a story about Jeff and Bean
sentences.target_language: これはJeffとBeanについての話です
sentences.romanized: kore wa Jeff to Bean ni tsuite no hanashi desu
Bean wa Jeff no inu desu

sentences.base_language: One day Bean asked Jeff, "Can I eat chocolate"
sentences.target_language: ある日BeanはJeffに聞きました「チョコレートを食べてもいい？」
sentences.romanized: aru hi Bean wa Jeff ni kikimashita "chokoreto wo tabete mo ii?"

sentences.base_language: Jeff said, "no, Chocolate is not good for dogs"
sentences.target_language: Jeffは言いました「だめ、チョコレートは犬に良くないよ」
sentences.romanized: Jeff wa iimashita "dame, chokoreto wa inu ni yokunai yo"

sentences.base_language: Bean got mad and said, "Why can you eat chocolate but I can't"
sentences.target_language: Beanは怒って言いました「なんであなたはチョコレートを食べられるのに私はだめなの？」
sentences.romanized: Bean wa okotte iimashita "nande anata wa chokoreto wo taberareru noni watashi wa dame na no?"

sentences.base_language: Jeff said, "CHOCOLATE ISN'T GOOD FOR DOGS"
sentences.target_language: Jeffは言いました「チョコレートは犬に良くないの！」
sentences.romanized: Jeff wa iimashita "chokoreto wa inu ni yokunai no!"

sentences.base_language: Bean waited for Jeff to get distracted
sentences.target_language: BeanはJeffが気を取られるのを待ちました
sentences.romanized: Bean wa Jeff ga ki wo torareru no wo machimashita

sentences.target_language: Beanはチョコレートバーを食べました
sentences.romanized: Bean wa chokoreto baa wo tabemashita

sentences.base_language: Jeff asked Bean, "where did the chocolate go?"
sentences.target_language: JeffはBeanに聞きました「チョコレートはどこに行った？」
sentences.romanized: Jeff wa Bean ni kikimashita "chokoreto wa doko ni itta?"

sentences.target_language: Beanは言いました「知らない」

sentences.base_language: Jeff knew that Bean ate the chocolate
sentences.target_language: JeffはBeanがチョコレートを食べたことを知っていました
sentences.romanized: Jeff wa Bean ga chokoreto wo tabeta koto wo shitte imashita

sentences.target_language: 後で、Beanは病気になりました
sentences.romanized: ato de, Bean wa byouki ni narimashita

sentences.base_language: Jeff said, "You are sick because you ate chocolate."
sentences.target_language: Jeffは言いました「チョコレートを食べたから病気になったんだよ」
sentences.romanized: Jeff wa iimashita "chokoreto wo tabeta kara byouki ni natta n da yo"

sentences.base_language: Jeff took bean to the doctor
sentences.target_language: JeffはBeanを医者に連れて行きました
sentences.romanized: Jeff wa Bean wo isha ni tsurete ikimashita

sentences.base_language: The doctor said, "Bean ate chocolate and he is sick"
sentences.target_language: 医者は言いました「Beanはチョコレートを食べたので病気です」
sentences.romanized: isha wa iimashita "Bean wa chokoreto wo tabeta node byouki desu"

sentences.target_language: Jeffはそれをもう知っていました
sentences.romanized: Jeff wa sore wo mou shitte imashita

sentences.base_language: Bean is such a little scamp
sentences.target_language: Beanは本当にいたずらっ子です
sentences.romanized: Bean wa hontou ni itazurakko desu
